final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a handwritten sign.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9:16 vertical portrait framing with 抖音 live-stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comments, gift animations, etc.)
Subject: must include 神仙姐姐 holding a sign in front of her
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical live-stream room or studio backdrop — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, lively live-stream atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI feel with on-screen overlay elements typical of the platform
Avoid:
